provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Cybercrime and Computer Related Crimes Act.

provisions.title: Interpretation

definitions.definition:
any—
( a ) data by which a computer service or computer or computer system is capable of being obtained, accessed or used

the following operations, if carried out in whole or in part by automated means—
( a ) the storage of data
the Commissioner of Police appointed by the President in terms of section 112 of the Constitution
any device, article or material from which data or information is capable of being stored or reproduced, with or without the aid of any other device or material

an electronic, magnetic or optical device or a group of interconnected or related devices, including the internet, one or more of which, pursuant to a programme, performs the automatic processing of data
data processing or the storage or retrieval of data
the Director-General of the Directorate on Corruption and Economic Crime appointed by the President in terms of section 4 of the Corruption and Economic Crime Act (Cap. 08:05)

the transfer of a sign, signal or data of any nature transmitted in whole or in part by an electrical, digital, magnetic, electromagnetic, optical, wire, wireless, radio, photo electronic or photo optical system or any other similar form
the logic, control, arithmetic, deletion, storage and retrieval, and communication and telecommunication to, from or within a computer or computer system

assets of every kind, whether corporeal or incorporeal, tangible or intangible, movable or immovable, however acquired, and legal documents in any form, including electronic or digital, evidencing title to or interest in such assets
any service involving the use of information and communication technology, including telecommunication services
any technology employed in the collecting, storing, using or sending out of information, including any technology involving the use of a computer or computer system or a telecommunication system
the aural or other acquisition of the contents of any electronic, magnetic, optical or oral data communication during transmission, through the use of any device

an instruction or a set of instructions, expressed in words, codes, schemes or any other form, which is capable, when incorporated in a machine-readable medium, of causing a computer or computer system to achieve a particular task, result or function

money or any other movable, immovable, corporeal or incorporeal thing, whether located in Botswana or elsewhere, and includes any rights, securities and any interest in privileges and claims over that thing, as well as—
( a ) any currency, whether or not the currency is legal tender in Botswana, and any bill, security, bond, negotiable instrument or any instrument capable of being negotiated which is payable to the bearer or endorsed "payable to the bearer", whether expressed in Botswana currency or otherwise
